finding: R5 — pooled -$8.8k is cost structure, not direction; momentum trigger = mechanical head start, zero residual info
one_line: Core thesis (costs dominate, residual continuation ~= 50%, ~3.3c gross hurdle) reproduces exactly and survives every stress; but the 'POSITIVE gross selection at mid +0.55c' leg is refuted — it is an asymmetric-survivorship artifact (keeps 71 profit-locked hedged winners, drops 70 stop-lossed trades whose hold-to-resolution counterfactual win rate is 1.4%) and is statistically zero in every universe.

accounting_pooled_3495.mine_vs_artifact: sel_at_mid +0.551 vs +0.55; sel_at_fill -1.056 vs -1.06; fee 1.683 vs 1.68; slip 1.107 vs 1.10; net -2.743 vs -2.74 — exact match
accounting_pooled_3495.reconciliation: pnl_model vs pnl_logged gap 0.00c/share on 3,424 clean holds; -0.031c/share pooled (hedge legs, ~-$98.6)

reproduction.momentum_subclaim: claimed 'won 56.8% at 59c (q*=.596)'; I measure loose/floor/band/value/fade win/loss trades: 56.0% unweighted, 54.6% share-weighted, at 55.5c share-weighted fill (q*=.573). Numbers differ slightly from claim but conclusion identical: win rate < q* at fill.

flaw_check_merge_agent.flagged: positive-selection-at-mid rests on mid = ask-0.5c and hold-to-resolution counterfactuals for stop-loss + hedged trades; true gross selection could be zero/negative
flaw_check_merge_agent.resolution: CONFIRMED in substance, with the mechanism pinned down differently than hypothesized:
details: mid = ask-0.5c itself is fine mechanically: 32/33 decision-time spreads in state_extract are exactly 1c

the real defect is sample construction: the 3,495 win/loss sample INCLUDES 71 hedged trades (all 'loose'; profit-lock hedge placed median 263s/300s into the interval at 1-7c, i.e. only when main leg had reached ~93-99c; 70/71 won) and EXCLUDES 70 stop-lossed trades (result='stopped'); reconstructing their hold-to-resolution outcome from cb1m opens gives a 1.4% counterfactual win rate (1/70)

symmetric all-entries universe (n=3,565 = every signal that fired, stopped trades held to resolution): sel_at_mid = -0.475c/share, sel_at_ask = -0.975c, 1h-block CI at mid [-2.22, +1.23] — zero-to-negative
even in the artifact's own universe the +0.551c has CI [-1.26, +2.28]: never distinguishable from zero
conclusion: 'signals were right, prices were fatal' is not supported; correct statement is 'signals carried ~zero information relative to the standing quote; prices (costs) did the rest'

residual_leg.conclusion: zero-residual-information claim survives every stress; note residual is never significantly BELOW 50% at 2bps either (no exploitable fade)

selection_leg_on_symmetric_universe.bucket_edge_52_53_54c: sel_at_mid below/above edge: +0.95/-1.41, +0.84/-1.46, -0.19/-0.72 — above-cap entries always negative; sign of pooled selection not rescued at any edge
selection_leg_on_symmetric_universe.conclusion: positive selection does NOT survive; zero/negative under every stress

gross_selection_at_mid_c_per_share.universe: all 3,565 entries, stopped held to resolution

corrected_numbers.gross_hurdle_for_future_signal_c: ~3.3c (costs) with selection contributing ~0; invariants of R5 unchanged

multiple_comparisons: residual tested at K=5 thresholds (1/2/3/4/8bps), all reported; selection at 3 benchmarks x 3 universes x 3 bucket edges, all reported; conclusions are nulls, so K inflates rather than deflates confidence in them
